Heavy-Duty Banner Stand Hardware for Professional Display Setup

Professional outdoor banner retractor hardware designed for trade shows, events, and promotional displays. This heavy-duty system provides reliable performance in outdoor conditions while maintaining easy setup and portability.

Key Features & Benefits

  • Heavy-duty base construction with black end caps for durability
  • Removable feet attach securely for stable ground contact
  • Shock cord pole system enables quick assembly and breakdown
  • Dual banner capacity for double-sided promotional displays
  • Four ground stakes included for secure outdoor installation
  • Professional appearance suitable for corporate events and trade shows

Product Specifications

  • Assembled Dimensions: 35.63" W x 82.25" H x 32.35" D
  • Total Weight: 17.6 lbs for easy transport
  • Banner Capacity: Holds two retractable banners simultaneously
  • Setup Type: Portable with ground stake anchoring system

Frequently Asked Questions - Banner Retractor Hardware

What banners work with this retractor hardware?

This hardware system is designed to hold two retractable banners with standard mounting mechanisms. The system accommodates banners up to 82.25" in height and works with most commercial retractable banner products.

How much wind can the hardware handle outdoors?

The combination of 17.6 lb base weight, removable feet, and four ground stakes provides substantial stability for normal outdoor conditions. However, we recommend monitoring weather conditions and securing or removing banners during high wind conditions.

Is assembly required for the banner stand hardware?

Yes, the hardware uses a shock cord pole system for easy setup. The poles connect quickly using the internal shock cord, and the removable feet attach securely to the base. Most users can complete setup in minutes.

Can I use just one banner instead of two?

Absolutely. While the hardware is designed to accommodate two retractable banners for double-sided displays, you can certainly use it with just one banner for directional or wall-facing applications.

What's included with the banner retractor hardware?

Your order includes the heavy-duty base with black end caps, shock cord pole system, removable feet, and four ground stakes for outdoor anchoring. Retractable banners are sold separately.

How portable is this banner stand system?

The system breaks down for transport with the shock cord pole compacting and feet removing from the base. At 17.6 lbs total weight, it's manageable for transport to trade shows and events, though you may want a rolling case for frequent travel.

Do you offer replacement parts?

Yes, replacement components are available for the shock cord poles, ground stakes, and other hardware elements. Contact our customer service team for specific replacement part needs.

What production time should I choose for my event?

For events with firm dates, we recommend 2-day express or 3-day standard production. If you're planning ahead, the 5-day saver option provides cost savings. Remember to add shipping time to your production time for total delivery schedule.
